using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

public sealed class BenchmarkResult
{
    public BenchmarkContext Context { get; init; } = null!;
    public double Score { get; init; } = 0;
    public TimeSpan Duration { get; init; } = TimeSpan.Zero;
    public string? Error { get; init; }
}

public sealed class ResumableBenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly string _stateDir;
    private readonly int _maxConcurrent;

    public ResumableBenchmarkRunner(string stateDir, int maxConcurrent = 1)
    {
        _stateDir = stateDir;
        _maxConcurrent = maxConcurrent;
    }

    public async Task<BenchmarkResult> RunAsync(BenchmarkContext context, CancellationToken ct = default)
    {
        var stateFile = Path.Combine(_stateDir, $"{context.Model}.state");
        var state = LoadState(stateFile);

        if (state != null && !ct.IsCancellationRequested)
        {
            // Resume from last checkpoint
            context = MergeContext(context, state);
        }

        using var cts = CancellationTokenSource.CreateLinkedTokenSource(ct);
        var semaphore = new SemaphoreSlim(_maxConcurrent);
        var tasks = new List<Task<BenchmarkResult>>();
